entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum americanum being studied for resistance to ergot disease.

entities.name: CLAVICEPS FUSIFORMIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes ergot in pearl millet.

entities.name: ERGOT
entities.description: The disease caused by Claviceps fusiformis in pearl millet.

entities.name: ERGOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist infection and severity of ergot.

entities.name: INTERMATING
entities.description: The process of crossing different cultivars to combine resistance factors.

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating progenies for resistance to ergot across generations.

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing individual inflorescences with low ergot severity to provide seed for the next generation.

entities.name: GERM PLASM
entities.description: The genetic resources from which less susceptible cultivars were identified.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic factors within the Pennisetum americanum collection.
